The '''Gun of Command''' was a high-tech weapon from the planet [[Charubah]] in the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]].

==Description==
[[File:GunofCommand2-FF76.png|thumb|left|250px|A profile view of the Gun of Command]]
The gun was more dangerous than almost any other weapon because it made victims unable to distinguish between their own thoughts and the enemy's, allowing the [[Hapan]]s to control them. The guns worked by releasing an electromagnetic wave field which disabled the victim's thought processes. Once affected, the victim would follow ''any'' simple command given, even blatantly suicidal ones. In fact, the Gun of Command was used as a form of execution, where the condemned [[Gender/Legends|male]] (no females were executed on Hapes under any circumstances) would be shot with the weapon, then handed a blaster and ordered to take his own life.

==History==
A rifle version developed by [[Royal Armaments Guild of Charubah]] turned up on [[Kabal/Legends|Kabal]] around [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], in the possession of [[Cecil Noone]], who had stolen the weapon and was trying to sell it to the [[Krish (species)/Legends|Krish]] hunter [[Tyro Viveca/Legends|Tyro Viveca]]. Cecil claimed that the rifle was a one-of-a-kind prototype, packing twice the "persuasive potency" of the pistol version, and capable of affecting a [[Human/Legends|Human]] for about an hour, an [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] for two or three, and a [[Houk/Legends|Houk]] for forty minutes.

[[File:GunofCommand3-FF76.png|thumb|right|250px|The Hapan Gun of Command]]
The rulers of the Hapes Cluster presented [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] with 63 treasures from their worlds, including the Gun of Command. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] used the gun to force Leia to run away with him to the planet of [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]], then removed the circuitry on the barrel, rendering it useless to Leia when she thought to use it against him once she realized what he had done.

Another Gun of Command was used on [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] by three [[Hapan]]s, when he attempted to interfere in their interrogation of [[Drackmarian]] warlord, [[Omogg]], but Luke used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to neutralize its effect, before telekinetically relieving them of it.
